detail_desc: He doesn't have any expression, nor anything special about him.
long_desc: A eunuch stands here, guarding the harem.

detail_desc:
The woman looks as though she would be content wandering around all day,
seeing everything there is possible to see.  She is a traveler, judging by her
semi-poor clothes, and probably not possessing of a lot of material wealth.
long_desc: A sightseer is here, smiling at the sights.

detail_desc:
The man just wanders around, his dull eyes absorbing all of the sights he can
see.
long_desc: A man is here, wandering aimlessly.

detail_desc:
She looks like she has all the time in the world and nowhere to be.  She is
obviously very content with just seeing the sights.
long_desc: A woman is here, wandering around aimlessly.

detail_desc:
The carver is middle-aged and obviously very proud of the works he displays,
carried in the two bags at his waist.  He politely encourages you to buy some of
his works, unlike some of the people around DEMANDING you buy their wares.
long_desc: A carver is here, selling his wares.

detail_desc:
The woman looks rather poor, but happy in her work of yelling at the passers
by to buy her wonderful kitchenware!
long_desc: A woman yells here, selling kitchenware.

detail_desc: This man is selling his furniture, and would like your business.
long_desc: A man stands here, selling his furniture.

detail_desc:
She looks as though dust is her worst enemy - and she shall wipe out the
entire species if she can!
long_desc: A maid stands here, looking for dust.

detail_desc: He looks like he thinks himself very important.
long_desc: Degruziel's advisor stands here, looking important.

detail_desc:
The bodyguard looks as though he knows what he's going - protecting.  He also
doesn't look like the kind of person to mess with without thinking about it
first.
long_desc: A bodyguard stands here, looking mean.

detail_desc:
He looks as if he enjoys keeping the peace for Haven.  It would be unwise to
make him angry.
long_desc: An elite patrolman is here, walking Haven and looking for trouble.

detail_desc:
This guard looks as if he knows the use of his weapon well.  It would be a
bad idea to cross him.
long_desc: An elite guard stands here, protecting the innocent.

detail_desc:
This man is obviously enjoying his life.  He loves his town, Haven, and just
sits here, enjoying all of the life that goes on around him.
long_desc: A citizen is here, resting and looking about himself happily.

detail_desc:
His voice is clear and strong.  It is so good it might make you wish to give
him coin...  Or buy him supper.
long_desc: A bard is here, singing to a strummed tune.

detail_desc:
This tumbler is tall, thin, and lightning quick.  He draws a crowd on good
days, and appears to make a living off his skill.
long_desc: A tumbler is here, doing handstands.

detail_desc:
She looks rather busty, but don't try anything...  She looks as though she
wouldn't take any crap from anyone.  Some of the men in the room give her
fearful glances if she so much as makes a slight threatening move.
long_desc: A busty tavern wench is here, serving drinks.

detail_desc: It looks dirty....  It looks like mud.  Wow.  It might even be a snake.
long_desc: An unusual-looking mud slick is here, swirling.

detail_desc: There is something strange about those bubbles...
long_desc: Little bubbles pip up through the water here.

detail_desc:
This dog is small and white, with brown markings.  Apparently she likes to
bark because she barks at everything that moves...  And even things that don't
move.  This dog barks at her own shadow.
long_desc: A yappy dog stands here, barking... and barking... and barking...

detail_desc:
This cat is small, but has muscles that indicate it could move like
lightning.
long_desc: A cat is here, looking small but fast.

detail_desc:
This dog is skinny and on his last leg of life.  Foams surrounds his mouth.
He is obviously rabid.  He is also obviously a very LARGE dog.
long_desc: A rabid dog stands here, looking mean.

detail_desc:
This rat looks at you with beady, unafraid eyes as if it can see right
through you.  It appears completely unafraid.
long_desc: A rat is here... boy is it huge.

detail_desc:
This boy walks around the room asking those with glasses if they would like a
refill.
long_desc: A serving boy is here, bearing a pitcher full of wine.

detail_desc:
This gentleman is obviously used to company with more morals and higher
intelligence.  He looks around at the opulence around him with disgust, appalled
at such wasteful spending.  After all, this money could go to help the poor!
long_desc: A gentleman stands here, looking about himself in disgust.

detail_desc:
This lady is wear a dress that hints at everything but reveals nothing.  Her
demeanor and speech is of the high born, but she acts like a harlot, using her
feminine allure on everyone nearby.
long_desc: A well-born lady stands here, busily seducing the other guests.

detail_desc:
Between his arrogant sips this guest talks about the downfalls of killing off
all the poor people in the world, as if he is convincing himself not to.  His
manner shows he was born rich and has never known poverty as anything but
missing a meal.
long_desc: An honored guest stands here, arrogantly sipping some wine.

detail_desc:
This manor guard looks as if he is very importantly guarding...  Something.
It must be important to him at least.  He closely scrutinizes everyone that
walks past.
long_desc: A manor guard stands here, guarding.

detail_desc:
He looks very strong, and he plainly wishes to take care of anyone and
everyone that might wish harm his master...  By putting them six feet under.
long_desc: Degruziel's bodyguard stands here, watching him protectively.

detail_desc:
This woman is blankly smiling at air, ignoring anything and everything around
her.  One might mistake her for the typical high-born woman, but there is some
sort of glint deep in her eyes that you can't quite place.
long_desc: A smiling woman stands here, not looking... very smart...

detail_desc:
The filcher looks as though he is trying to hide in any and all nearby
shadows.  You would think that attempting to hide in shadows would make you
inconspicuous, but apparently that isn't the case.  Dodging around and trying to
walk quietly is only getting this filcher noticed.
long_desc: A filcher stands here, half-hidden by the shadows.

detail_desc:
He has long, slender fingers that he twists along the bottom of his shirt
with a deft twist.  As he sees you looking his way he tries to fit into the
shadows.
long_desc: A pickpocket is here, trying to blend in with the shadows.

detail_desc:
She looks as if she is already a professional at her young age, about to go
out and cheat a few tourists out of their money.  She adjusts her fake peg leg
and gets ready to go out for a round of begging.
long_desc: A small child stands here, adjusting her fake peg leg.

detail_desc:
The man is short and slender, rather curvy for a man.  He wears black, baggy
clothes.  His black moustache is slightly crooked.  It looks as if he messed up
his trimming slightly.
long_desc: A smiling man stands here, rubbing at his slightly crooked moustache.

detail_desc: You can't really make out the features.
long_desc: A shadowy form is here.

detail_desc: He is quite obviously asleep in his bedroll, and that is that.
long_desc: A man is here, sleeping in his bedroll.

detail_desc:
He looks as if he would push around his own mother until he received all of
her money.  Then he might just kill her for the fun of it.  He doesn't look like
a nice guy.  He is clad all in black, and would blend in well with any shadows.
long_desc: A black-clad bully stands here, picking his nails with a dagger.

detail_desc:
The King of Luna's Alley has a small glint of sanity left in his eyes, though
why somebody would want to be the king of this place is a sign of insanity in
itself.  Some people are just different...  Whatever floats your boat.
long_desc: The King of Luna's Alley is here, appearing slightly more sane than his peers.

detail_desc:
This bum has obviously gone insane, as he just stands here quietly cackling
to himself.
long_desc: A bum stands here, quietly cackling.

detail_desc: It looks as if this crazy person is on one of their screaming phrases.
long_desc: A paranoid schizophrenic stands here, screaming at the world.

detail_desc:
The halfwit is thoroughly content to just sit here and stare at the ground
all day, watching their drool accumulate into a small puddle.
long_desc: A halfwit sits here, drooling.

detail_desc:
He looks quite insane, but his face is sincere as he talks to the wall in a
language that only they can understand.
long_desc: A gibbering madman stands here, talking to the wall.

detail_desc:
The raving lunatic is clad only in what rags he could find.  He might have
once been a handsome man, but now he has scars across his cheeks.  The look like
they might have been caused by fingernails.  Perhaps his own.
long_desc: A raving lunatic is here, preaching the destruction of the world.

detail_desc:
He looks just like any other sailor, except he wears an apron and angrily
brandishes a herring at his simmering delights.
long_desc: The ship's cook stands here, brandishing a baked bread nastily.

detail_desc:
Mithroq is a huge minotaur.  His muscles bulge and twist as he works at his
art, creating weapons.  He looks super-strong, and has the marks of many
battles.  His left horn is broken in half, and scars mark his brown fur.  He
doesn't look like someone you would want to mess with.
long_desc: Mithroq stands here, his horns almost scraping the ceiling.

detail_desc:
The mistress of the shop is here.  Tia is a thin, frail woman who wears
flowing blue robes.  She can always be seen mixing a potion or two, or helping
people find things in her shop.
long_desc: Tia stands here, mixing a potion and looking ready to help you.

detail_desc:
Milos is a short, thin man of middle age with a short moustache.  His only
love in life is his money, and your money.  He would love to hold your money for
you while you are out adventuring.
long_desc: Milos stands behind the counter here, happily counting his money.

detail_desc:
One of the many wealthy shoppers looking to waste more off their hard earned
money.
long_desc: The wandering shopper stands here, looking for a merchant to spend money on.

detail_desc:
She looks as though she is looking for someone, and she is not very happy
about it.  Perhaps her husband went to the bar again and she doesn't yet know
it.  No matter, she is angry anyway.
long_desc: A fisherman's wife stands here, looking around and muttering.

detail_desc:
She looks as if she could just sunbathe all day long and then look at the
stars all night.  She doesn't appear to have a care in the world.
long_desc: A sunbather lies here, enjoying lying in the sand.

detail_desc: He looks as if he is enjoying the fine scenery.
long_desc: A citizen is here, strolling past.

detail_desc: She looks as if she is enjoying the fine scenery.
long_desc: A citizen is here, strolling past.

detail_desc: The king crab does @RNOT@n like intruders in his lair.
long_desc: A king crab is here, looking mean.

detail_desc:
She looks as if she is lost in her own little world.  She is staring at the
Captain as if she doesn't really see him, but there is a wide smile on her face
as if she is remembering something pleasant.
long_desc: The Captain's woman is here, looking at the Captain with dreamy eyes.

detail_desc:
The Captain of the ship is very involved with his daydream.  After all, he
has no work to do now that the ship is in the port.  He wears a soft smile, as
though his daydream is good.  He also doesn't like people in his quarters...
long_desc: The Captain of the ship stands here, looking off into space.

detail_desc:
This man looks as though he will, when ordered, pull the rope so that the net
will drop all of its fish onto the deck.  He has a spare net draped over his
shoulder, in case the current one needs repairs.
long_desc: A man stands here, next to the rope connected to the net.

detail_desc:
He goes about his work like a pro, throwing the heavy fish over the edge of
the deck without even looking.  He knows there is and always will be cartmen
down there waiting for him to throw a fish down into their carts.
long_desc: A fish pitcher is here, throwing fish over the edge of the deck.

detail_desc:
He stands next to a ship, waiting patiently for his turn to get his cart
filled so that he may hurry away to the market and the vendor that wishes to
purchase the fish.
long_desc: A man with a cart stands here, waiting patiently.

detail_desc:
He looks as if he is in a hurry to get himself and his cart to wherever it is
he is going, and he isn't going to stop for anything if he can help it.
long_desc: A man speeds through the crowd here with his cart.

detail_desc:
He looks as if he has enjoyed a few too many of the local drinks.  He sings
in a loud clear voice, a bawdy sailing song.
long_desc: A patron of the bar stands here, singing loudly.

detail_desc:
He doesn't look like much.  He is young, slightly handsome, but his eyes have
a hard glint to them that shows you he has seen his share of fights.  His
muscular arms could easily break up any brawls, should they start.  He doesn't
look at you, but you know he wishes you to buy a drink if you wish to stay any
length of time.
long_desc: Gilles the Bartender stands here, patiently polishing glasses.

detail_desc:
This man stumbles and drools in such a manner that it is very obvious he has
had more than a few too many drinks.  He occasionally mutters insults to his
imaginary friend, whom the drunk often accuses of tripping him.  You can see
some of the people nearby looking at him with obvious disgust, but some just
plain don't care.  They see enough of his kind since the tavern was built.
long_desc: A drunken man is here, stumbling around in circles.

detail_desc:
Aramut is tall and skinny, and has the rolling walk of one who had once been
a sailor.  He looks very old, but not at all weak.  His skinny frame is wiry
with the muscles he had acquired, as he has worked for long years as the armorer
of Haven.  He impatiently taps his fingers on the counter as he waits for you to
tell him what you wish of him.
long_desc: Aramut the wizened old man stands here, waiting to help you.

detail_desc:
This cartman is casually rummaging around in the back of his cart, looking
over his goods.  It looks pretty full, and the man looks very alert and
possessive of it.  The cartman is a big, muscular man who looks as if he knows
the use of his weapon.  His muscles ripple as he casually tosses heavy chairs
and such from one side of his cart to the other.  From his dress he looks like a
sailor, as do most of the people in Haven.
long_desc: A cartman stands here, rummaging around in the back of his cart.

detail_desc:
It looks unfinished.  C/c This harem girl looks as if she gets all the
special attention she could ever want or need.  She even has a few gifts from
Degruziel to her.  She appears very happy with what she does, even though some
other people might not like it...
long_desc: An especially beautiful harem girl is here, being over-pampered and envied by the other girls

detail_desc:
The harem girl looks very young, but it doesn't appear that she minds her
job.  After all, most of her day is spent sitting around and looking pretty.
She gets well-fed, well-paid, and she hardly has to do anything now that
Degruziel has a favorite, and it isn't her.  She thinks she has it made, and it
shows on her pampered face.
long_desc: A harem girl lounges here, beautiful and not wearing much.

detail_desc:
The young kitchenmaid glances apprehensively over her shoulder as she
hurriedly pours contents into a mixing bowl.  Sometimes her glance will stray to
Tiama, if she is present.  It is quite possible this young girl is afraid of the
head cook, like so many of her smart peers.
long_desc: A kitchenmaid stands here covered in flour, mixing something.

detail_desc:
The prisoner looks as though he has been beaten several times and starved, he
is as thin as a toothpick.  He is manacled to the wall, and muttering all sorts
of nonsense.  Occasionally he will let out a yell for help, however.  Maybe you
should listen to him.
long_desc: A half-mad prisoner is shackled here in the filth, muttering to himself

detail_desc:
The Master of Torture doesn't like intruders into his lair....  Which means
you.
long_desc: Degruziel's Master of Torture stands here, looking very sinister.

detail_desc:
Tiama is plump from tasting her own creations, but she waves her spoon around
as if she isn't afraid to give any of the kitchen girls a good whack.
long_desc: Tiama, the Head Cook of Haven, stands here covered from head to toe in flour.

detail_desc:
Degruziel is lazing around, but the way his eyes quickly shift to take
everything in tells you he is an experienced warrior.  His hand rests casually
on the mace at his belt, as if he wouldn't be afraid to use it if things got out
of hand.
long_desc: Degruziel, the Lord of Haven, is here, lounging lazily and conversing with his guests.

detail_desc:
With his well-tailored clothes and his expensive jewelry, this painted man
looks as though he cares nothing about the poor or their welfare.  The glass of
wine he so casually sips looks as though it could be sold for enough money to
feed a fishing family for weeks.
long_desc: A rich guest stands here, casually sipping some expensive wine.

detail_desc:
This manservant looks like he's hurriedly going about doing something very
important...  Though what exactly it is he's doing is unapparent.
long_desc: A manservant of Degruziel stands here, attending to... whatever it is he's attending to.

detail_desc:
This woman looks as tough - if not tougher - than any man around.  How else
would she get the job as stablemaster?  She talks to the horses as if she speaks
their language.
long_desc: The Stablemaster stand here... what?! A WOMAN?!?!

detail_desc:
He looks very unhappy with his job, but at least it gets him food and a warm
bed.  He mucks out the stalls mechanically, giving his pitchfork an expert twist
every time he throws something into the nearby wheelbarrow.
long_desc: A stableboy stands here, contemplating life as he mucks out stalls.

detail_desc:
The plodding donkey looks like she is very bored, but the muscles she has
received from hauling things to and fro all day have given her bulging muscles.
long_desc: A donkey is here, plodding away with its head down.

detail_desc:
The swearing cartman is red in the face from anger.  The long strings of
expletives coming from his mouth make the people around him wince and cover
their children's ears.
long_desc: A cartman stands here, swearing profusely at the traffic and his draft animal.

detail_desc:
The horse tosses its head and snorts, full of energy and eager to be off.
It looks more like a rider's horse, not a cart horse, and is full of spirit.
long_desc: A prancing horse stands here, tossing its pretty head.

detail_desc:
This merchant looks disappointed - apparently he hasn't had much business
today.  He keeps his hand on his weapon as if he knows it well, probably to ward
off thieves.
long_desc: A merchant stands here, advertising his wares at the top of his lungs.

detail_desc:
He looks rather burly and rather mean, so you might want to leave him alone.
He also looks like he could hold his own in a fight.
long_desc: A sailor stands here, walking like he belongs on the sea.

detail_desc:
He is short with wavy black hair, something that doesn't fit the setting of
Haven very well.  He also appears very confused, listening intently and trying
to figure out what people around him are saying.
long_desc: An outlander stands here looking very confused.

detail_desc:
The woman is clad in the garb of one who travels much, and her mouth is
slightly open as she looks around with wide eyes at the sights.
long_desc: An admirer of Haven is here, appearing awestruck.

detail_desc:
The little boy is happily whistling as he looks around.  Something about his
manner tells you that he is probably skipping out on his chores to view the
town.
long_desc: A little boy stands here, smiling happily.

detail_desc:
A tall, stately woman is here in a pretty dress, probably on her way to a
vendor in the market.  She appears to be richly dressed, and is probably a
merchant's wife.
long_desc: A woman of Haven is here, humming softly to herself.

detail_desc:
This motherly woman stands here in the breeze, her colorful and heavily
patched dress billowing.  She calls out a name, probably of her child, and she
has an angry look on her face.  Boy, is somebody in trouble.
long_desc: A short, matronly citizen of Haven is here, her patched dress billowing in the constant breeze.

detail_desc:
The burly man of Haven stands here, his pipe hanging from his mouth.  He
looks as though he is talking to himself about the market prices.
long_desc: A citizen of Haven

detail_desc:
An elite gatekeeper often wonders why he was chosen for the monotonous job
of watching Haven's gates.  The usually peaceful city doesn't see much trouble
from the merchants and tourists, so his days pass slowly as he wishes for
excitement.
long_desc: An elite gatekeeper stands here looking bored.

detail_desc:
Having devoted his entire life to this work, the diligent carver is almost
completely absorbed in the gates of Haven, always seeking to improve them with
his skillful hand and his sharp knife.
long_desc: A diligent carver stands here, biting on the end of his knife.
